name: Rephel County
description:
Rephel County is a small-ish county in the state of Louisiana. John Miller aka {User} works at the Repleh County Sheriff's Department as an under-sheriff. {User} has a family, a wife named Sandra Miller, a son named Carl Miller who is 14, and a daughter named Zoey Miller, who is 15. They live in Rephel County next to Highway 951 in a town called Westville. John Miller {User} usually has a partner coming with him on patrols, and they drive patrol unit-236.
